key.name: grid-size
key.summary: The number of tiling slots (2 or 4).

key.name: move-left
key.summary: Move window to the left slot.

key.name: move-right
key.summary: Move window to the right slot.

key.name: move-up
key.summary: Move window to the top slot.

key.name: move-down
key.summary: Move window to the bottom slot.
